html:
Exclusive to:

When given to the Antlion as tribute, this trinket delays its rage by 0.66 days.

The Frayed Yarn can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_22".

×4

Trivia

  • Both the appearance and the source code (`prefabs/catcoonden.lua`) of the Hollow Stump suggest that it should drop a Frayed Yarn upon destruction. However, the line of code adding it to the loot table has been commented out.
plainText:
Frayed Yarn
Object Info
40
Source
Dropped by
Miscellaneous
"trinket_22"
Exclusive to:
“Maybe I'll brush up on some string theory.”
–Wilson
“If I set this on fire it would just vaporize.”
–Willow
“Will take to fragile man Maxwell. He always talk about 'pulling strings'.”
–Wolfgang
“I'm not a-frayed.”
–Wendy
“WHO KEEPS TYING TOGETHER ALL THOSE BIRDS?”
–WX-78
“My grandmother used to knit.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'd rather have some proper rope.”
–Woodie
“The monster child gets tangled in this frequently.”
–Maxwell
“It wön't stand up tö the rigörs öf battle.”
–Wigfrid
“Maybe we'll find another use for this.”
–Webber
“This would be handy if I had a roast to make.”
–Warly
“Ball!”
–Wormwood
“I got no use for that.”
–Winona
“Fried and frayed, just like my brain!”
–Wortox
“Tiny rope?”
–Wurt
“I like a good yarn. Heh...”
–Walter
“I'm neither a cat nor a knitter. Maybe someone else will want it.”
–Wanda
When given to the Antlion as tribute, this trinket delays its rage by 0.66 days.
The Frayed Yarn can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_22".
×4
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Both the appearance and the source code (`prefabs/catcoonden.lua`) of the Hollow Stump suggest that it should drop a Frayed Yarn upon destruction. However, the line of code adding it to the loot table has been commented out.
